import pytest
from your_module import hex_to_rgb  # replace with actual module name

# Happy path tests
@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "input_hex, expected",
    [
        ("#000000", (0, 0, 0)),
        ("#FFFFFF", (255, 255, 255)),
        ("#FF00AA", (255, 0, 170)),
        ("#00ff00", (0, 255, 0)),
        ("123456", (18, 52, 86)),          # without leading '#'
        ("#aBcDeF", (171, 205, 239)),      # mixed case
        ("abcdef", (171, 205, 239)),       # lowercase without '#'
        ("#808080", (128, 128, 128)),
    ],
)
def test_hex_to_rgb_valid(input_hex, expected):
    """Test valid hex color strings return correct RGB tuples."""
    assert hex_to_rgb(input_hex) == expected


# Edge-case tests
def test_hex_to_rgb_min_value():
    """Test the smallest possible value (#000000)."""
    assert hex_to_rgb("#000000") == (0, 0, 0)


def test_hex_to_rgb_max_value():
    """Test the largest possible value (#FFFFFF)."""
    assert hex_to_rgb("#
